summary: Smoothed the entry from chapter 7 by removing a near-verbatim blanket repeat and tightened the exit toward chapter 9 by tying the rookery noise to Mina's BrightCurrent donor-memory frame.
edits: Rephrased the opening blanket detail to preserve continuity without repeating chapter 7's exact action.
Adjusted the late rookery description to cue the BrightCurrent stewardship spectacle that drives the next chapter opening.
